title: echinochloa crus-galli var. utilis
intro: Echinochloa crus-galli var. utilis, also known as Japanese barnyard grass or Japanese barnyard millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echinochloa crus-galli var. utilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. It can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and other folk remedies.
